summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink Iteration 10 features completed. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Marketplace page with AI Seller Tools button, Seller Dashboard accessibility with stats and AI tools, Image watermarking, File upload, AI image generation cost estimation, and Guest Marketplace browsing.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/seller/stats - Returns seller statistics with all fields
Backend: POST /api/watermark/apply-to-image - Successfully applies watermark to image
Backend: POST /api/watermark/apply-to-image - Works with center position
Backend: POST /api/watermark/apply-to-image - Works with data URL prefix
Backend: POST /api/ai-media/estimate-cost - Returns cost for image generation
Backend: POST /api/ai-media/estimate-cost - Returns cost for video generation
Backend: POST /api/upload/file - Successfully uploads image files
Backend: POST /api/upload/file - Rejects unsupported file types (400)
Frontend: Marketplace page loads with AI Seller Tools button
Frontend: AI Seller Tools button navigates to /seller-dashboard
Frontend: Seller Dashboard shows stats (Active Listings, Total Sales, Views, BL Coins)
Frontend: Seller Dashboard has tabs (Overview, AI Create Listing, My Listings, Photo Editor, Shipping)
Frontend: Seller Dashboard shows AI Recommendations for listings
Frontend: Guest Marketplace /marketplace/guest loads with 12 items
Frontend: Guest Marketplace has search, category filters, and cart
critical_code_review_comments: Seller Dashboard /api/seller/stats endpoint correctly returns all required fields (total_listings, active_listings, sold_items, total_revenue, average_rating, total_views, conversion_rate, bl_coins_earned)
Image watermarking /api/watermark/apply-to-image works with Pillow library, supports diagonal and center positions
AI Image Generation /api/ai-media/estimate-cost correctly estimates costs (image=200, video=400+ based on duration)
File upload /api/upload/file validates file types and returns data_url and file_url
Marketplace page correctly shows AI Seller Tools button with data-testid='seller-tools-btn'
Guest Marketplace /marketplace/guest allows browsing products, rentals, and services without login
MOCKED: AI image/video generation requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - actual generation not tested
MOCKED: Video watermarking requires FFmpeg which may not be installed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 testing completed. All requested features verified: Seller Dashboard accessible from Marketplace via 'AI Seller Tools' button, /api/seller/stats returns complete stats, /api/watermark/apply-to-image applies watermarks to base64 images, /api/ai-media/estimate-cost estimates AI generation costs, /api/upload/file uploads images/videos, Guest Marketplace allows browsing without login. MOCKED: Actual AI image/video generation and video watermarking (requires FFmpeg). Music generation returns 501 Not Implemented.
